rag_rules: Place component type contracts (assumptions, guarantees) in `annex agree { ... };` blocks within the component type.
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections.
Use AADL model as the authoritative source for component structure.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts should reference visible identifiers (ports, features) from the AADL model.
Output dependency guarantees should relate visible outputs to visible inputs.
When defining ranges, use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations from the requirement.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq <variable_name> : <type> = <expression>;` to define equations within the AGREE annex.
Ensure helper variable types match the expression type (bool, int, real).
anti_patterns: Do not use AADL properties (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly as variables in AGREE expressions.
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers.
